NCAA College Basketball · 2025-26 Season

Playmaking Leaderboard
Ranks qualified NCAA players by playmaking performance for the 2025-26 season. Sorted by PMI (Playmaking Index) — a composite score combining assists, efficiency and ball security. Click any column header to re-sort. Click a player name to view their full profile.
ColumnDescription
APGAssists per game
AST%Assist percentage — estimated % of teammate field goals assisted while on court
TOVTurnovers per game
TOV%Turnover percentage — turnovers per 100 possessions used
AST/TOAssist-to-turnover ratio
PMIPlaymaking Index — composite KPI combining APG, AST%, AST/TO and turnover avoidance
PMI PctilePMI percentile rank vs. all qualified players in the same season

Qualified only
Portal only
